scripts.dev: npm run build --workspace @graphicsflow/shared && concurrently -k -n shared,server,web "npm run dev --workspace @graphicsflow/shared" "npm run dev --workspace @graphicsflow/server" "wait-on http://127.0.0.1:3001/api/health && npm run dev --workspace @graphicsflow/web"
scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @graphicsflow/shared && npm run build --workspace @graphicsflow/server && npm run build --workspace @graphicsflow/web
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck --workspace @graphicsflow/shared && npm run typecheck --workspace @graphicsflow/server && npm run typecheck --workspace @graphicsflow/web
